d: Zandrok raises his axe and slams it down on an enemy, destroying all obstacles within 2 tiles of their position. The impact deals [[12%]]<HP> damage to enemies in the area and knocks them in the air for [[1]]s.
Increases the impact damage to [[14%]]<HP>.
Increases the impact damage to [[16%]]<HP>.
Increases the impact damage to [[18%]]<HP>.
Increases the impact damage to [[20%]]<HP>.

Passive. When a battle starts, Zandrok summons illusions of himself that charge forward in a 5-tile-wide wedge formation toward the enemy side, dealing [[10%]]<HP> damage and destroying all obstacles in their path. Any allies they pass through, including Zandrok, become inspired. Inspired Zandrok and allies gain [[50%]] and [[20%]] extra max HP respectively until the battle ends, with their current HP remaining unchanged. They also increase their Life Drain by [[40]], Haste by [[20]], and movement speed by [[100%]] for [[8]]s.
Active. Zandrok inspires allies within 2 tiles, increasing their Life Drain by [[25]] and Haste by [[14]] for [[8]]s. Unstackable.
Increases allies' Life Drain by [[30]] and their Haste by [[16]] when Zandrok casts this skill.
Increases allies' Life Drain by [[35]] and their Haste by [[18]] when Zandrok casts this skill.
Increases allies' Life Drain by [[40]] and their Haste by [[20]] when Zandrok casts this skill.
Zandrok stomps the ground, dealing damage equal to [[12%]] of his max HP to enemies within 1 tile and stunning them for [[1.5]]s.
Increases the damage dealt to [[13%]] of Zandrok's max HP.
Increases the damage dealt to [[14%]] of Zandrok's max HP.
Increases the damage dealt to [[15%]] of Zandrok's max HP.
Zandrok increases his max HP by [[12%]] during battle. He further increases his max HP by an extra [[6%]] while the temporary buffs granted by Rallying Roar are active.
Zandrok increases his max HP by [[18%]] during battle. He further increases his max HP by an extra [[9%]] while the temporary buffs granted by Rallying Roar are active.
Zandrok increases his max HP by [[24%]] during battle. He further increases his max HP by an extra [[12%]] while the temporary buffs granted by Rallying Roar are active.
When Zandrok's HP is higher than [[50%]] of his initial max HP, his normal attacks deal extra damage equal to [[4%]] of his max HP.
Increases the extra damage to [[5%]] of Zandrok's max HP.
Enhances the next normal attack of allies inspired by Rallying Roar, making it deal extra damage equal to [[15%]] of their own max HP. This extra damage cannot exceed [[100%]] of Zandrok's max HP.
Increases the extra damage to [[6%]] of Zandrok's max HP.
Any excess healing Zandrok receives is converted into extra max HP. The total max HP gained from this effect cannot exceed [[50%]] of his initial max HP.
